name: dataio
description: Enterprise database knowledge base MVP for read-only SQL assistance.

scripts.logs: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force logs | Out-Null; if (!(Test-Path logs/runtime.log)) { New-Item -ItemType File logs/runtime.log | Out-Null }; Get-Content logs/runtime.log -Tail 100 -Wait"
